rewritten_requirements: The system shall start in a stopped state.
The system shall begin playing music when a disc is inserted and the user presses play.
The system shall allow the user to pause the music at any time while it is playing.
The system shall stop the music temporarily when paused but allow resuming from the same point.
The system shall allow the user to stop the player at any time, regardless of whether the music is playing or paused.
The system shall return to a stopped state when the player is stopped.
The system shall allow switching to another disc and continuing playback if multiple discs are available.
The system shall remain in a stopped state when no more discs are left.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The CD player starts in a stopped condition.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A CD player usually starts in a stopped condition, waiting for the user to play a disc.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When a disc is inserted and the user presses play, the player begins playing the music.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When a disc is inside and the user presses play, the player begins playing the music.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can pause the music at any time while it is playing.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: While the music is playing, the user can pause it at any time.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When paused, the player stops the music temporarily but allows resuming from the same point.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When paused, the music stops temporarily, but it can easily continue from the same point when play is pressed again.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can stop the player at any time, whether the music is playing or paused.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The user can also stop the player at any time, whether the music is playing or paused. This returns the player to its stopped condition.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Stopping the player returns it to a stopped condition.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This returns the player to its stopped condition.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The player can switch to another disc and continue playing if multiple discs are available.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If there are multiple discs, the player can switch to another disc and continue playing.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When no more discs are left, the player remains stopped.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When there are no more discs left, the player simply remains stopped.
